title: T-018 — LP merge service + catch-weight sum (WH §6.5)
prompt:
# T-018 — LP merge service + catch-weight sum (WH §6.5)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §6.5
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement `mergeLicensePlates` service: primary + secondaries → primary.quantity += Σsec.qty, primary.catch_weight_kg = Σall cw (baseline D14), secondaries.status='merged', lp_genealogy operation='merge'. Strict validation: same product/uom/batch/expiry±tolerance/qa_status; secondaries must be `available` (never `reserved`).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-merge.ts`: function `mergeLicensePlates({primary_lp_id, secondary_lp_ids[]})`.
2. Validation: each secondary matches primary on product_id, uom, warehouse_id, batch_number (or both NULL), expiry_date within `merge_expiry_tolerance_days` (default 1), qa_status; secondary.status='available'; if `merge_cross_location=false`, all share location_id.
3. Atomic transaction: primary.quantity += Σ, primary.catch_weight_kg += Σ, secondaries.status='merged', INSERT lp_genealogy (each secondary→primary, operation='merge'), single outbox event lp.merged (caller emits).

## Files
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/lp-merge.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-merge.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given primary 50 BOX (cw=75kg) + 2 secondaries (30 BOX 45kg, 20 BOX 30kg) all matching, when merged, then primary.quantity=100, primary.catch_weight_kg=150, both secondaries.status='merged', and 2 lp_genealogy rows exist (V-WH-LP-004).
2. Given any secondary differs in batch_number, when merge is attempted, then it rejects with V-WH-LP-004.
3. Given any secondary is `reserved`, when merge is attempted, then it rejects with V-WH-LP-005.
4. Given expiry differs by 2 days and tolerance=1, when merge is attempted, then it rejects.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/lp-merge.test.ts` asserting catch-weight sum, validation failures, atomicity.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test lp-merge`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow merging reserved LPs (V-WH-LP-005).
- Do not lose catch weight — sum is mandatory baseline D14.
- Do not skip lp_genealogy rows.

## Dependencies
- T-016
- T-003
